arts.sum: Coventry City boss Frank Lampard has said goalkeeper Ben Wilson is ‘progressing’ well from injury. Coventry City have… The post ‘Progressing’ – Coventry City injury boost emerges as Frank Lampard shares update appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Stick or twist as Frank Lampard looks to build on Coventry City's precious clean sheet - Andy Turner
arts.sum: Predicted City team v WBA: Brad Collins; Milan van Ewijk, Bobby Thomas, Joel Latibeaudiere, Jake Bidwell; Josh Eccles, Ben Sheaf; Tatsuhiro Sakamoto, Jack Rudoni, Ephron Mason-Clark; Norman Bassette. Lampard might be minded to change things on the left if he feels Jake Bidwell can’t cope with three games in a week following his recovery from injury that kept him out for almost two months, in which case it will be a straight swap for Jay Dasilva.

arts.ttl: Surprise West Brom reunion backed to take place in the Premier League
arts.sum: Garlick left in 2018, having eventually replaced Ashworth's role, to become the director of football at the Premier League. Prior to that, Ashworth had been in the FA set-up for the previous six years, being lured away from Albion in 2013 having helped to guide them in his directorial capacity from the Championship and into the top half of the Premier League, during which time they established themselves as a top flight outfit for eight years.
